title: Brush-Up!++
description: Official mod support for the Brush-Up Resource Pack, including GUI textures, wood variants and other support for over 2-dozen mods!
body:
### About Brush-Up!++ This resource pack is an official add-on for the [Brush-Up!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brush-up) resource pack, adding compatibility for dozens of different mods to match the original pack's style across the board. **Have a request?** [Join the Discord](https://discord.oitsjustjose.com) and ask in `#br-requests`!
### Texture Coverage A few different types of textures are currently covered by Brush-Up!++: - Inventories/Containers/Other UI Widgets will now use the same style - Modded Bricks will now match style - Modded Pressure Plates, Buttons, Signs, Hanging Signs, Fences & Fence Gates will now match style
Additionally, several mods are supported!
  • Ad Astra
  • Atmospheric
  • Better Advancements
  • Biomes O' Plenty
  • Blood Magic
  • Blue Skies
  • Caged Mobs
  • Deep Aether
  • Ecologics
  • Embers Rekindled
  • End's Phantasm
  • Endless Biomes
  • Enlightend
  • Environmental
  • Expanded Storage
  • Extreme sound muffler
  • Forbidden and Arcanus
  • Gardens of the Dead
  • Good Ending
  • IronChests Restocked
  • Iter RPG
  • L_Ender's Cataclysm(Cataclysm)
  • Pretty Pipes
  • Pyrologer And Friends
  • Quark
  • Regions Unexplored
  • Sophisticated Core
  • Supplementaries
  • The Aether: Redux
  • The Aether
  • TrashSlot
  • Twigs
  • Ulterlands
  • Universal Sawmill
  • Unusual End
  • Upgrade Aquatic
  • Wizard's Reborn
